Name: Airport
Description: Indicates whether or not the node has an airport for air migration from (not to) the node. If set to 1, **Enable_Air_Migration** in the configuration file must be set to 1 or migration will not occur (see :doc:`parameter-configuration-migration` parameters). Primarily used to turn off migration in a particular node.

Name: BirthRate
Description: The birth rate, in births per person per day. In the configuration file, **Enable_Birth** must be set to 1 and **Birth_Rate_Dependence** will affect how this rate is used (see :doc:`parameter-configuration-population` parameters).

Name: InfectivityReservoirEndTime
Description: The ending of the exogeneous reservoir of infectivity. This parameter is conditional upon the configuration parameter, **Enable_Infectivity_Reservoir**, being enabled (set to 1).

Name: InfectivityReservoirSize
Description: The quantity-per-timestep added to the total infectivity present in a node; it is equivalent to the expected number of additional infections in a node, per timestep. For example, if timestep is equal to a day, then setting **InfectivityReservoirSize** to a value of 0.1 would introduce an infection every 10 days from the exogenous reservoir. This parameter is conditional upon the configuration parameter, **Enable_Infectivity_Reservoir**, being enabled (set to 1).

Name: InfectivityReservoirStartTime
Description: The beginning of the exogeneous reservoir of infectivity. This parameter is conditional upon the configuration parameter, **Enable_Infectivity_Reservoir**, being enabled (set to 1).

Name: InitialPopulation
Description: The number of people that will be populated into the node at the beginning of the simulation. You can scale this number using **Base_Population_Scale_Factor** in the configuration file (see :doc:`parameter-configuration-population` parameters).

Name: Latitude
Description: Latitude of the node in decimal degrees. This can be used for several things, including determining infectiousness by latitude and defining the size of grid cells.

Name: Longitude
Description: Longitude of the node in decimal degrees. This can be used for several things, including defining the size of grid cells.

Name: NodeAttributes
Description: The structure that contains parameters that add or modify information regarding the location, migration, habitat, and population of a simulation. Some **NodeAttributes** depend on values set in the configuration parameters.

Name: Region
Description: Indicates whether or not the node has a road network for regional migration from (not to) the node. If set to 1, **Enable_Regional_Migration** in the configuration file must be set to 1 or migration will not occur (see :doc:`parameter-configuration-migration` parameters). Primarily used to turn off migration in particular nodes.

Name: Seaport
Description: Indicates whether or not the node is connected by sea migration from (not to) the node. If set to 1, **Enable_Sea_Migration** in the configuration file must be set to 1 or migration will not occur (see :doc:`parameter-configuration-migration` parameters). Primarily used to turn off migration in particular nodes.
